title: solidago canadensis subsp. gilvocanescens
intro: Solidago canadensis subsp. gilvocanescens, also known as the Canadian goldenrod, is a subspecies of the Solidago canadensis plant, a flowering perennial native to Eastern North America. The medicinal properties of Solidago canadensis subsp. gilvocanescens include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which contribute to its health benefits. The plant has been traditionally used to treat various health issues, including digestive problems, respiratory issues, and skin conditions, due to its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. Solidago canadensis subsp. gilvocanescens can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or salve, making it a popular herbal remedy among natural health practitioners.
